subcodes.first_line: O thou near servant to the Threshold of God! Thy letter was received and thy desire became known. Thou wishest to serve the Threshold... ...Thou hast written concerning the organization of a Council for the building of the Mashrak-el-Azkar
subcodes.subjects: @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @preservation; transcription of the Sacred Writings, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @service to others; to the Cause of God
